Interface MatrixStorageFactory

All Known Implementing Classes:
NativeMatrixStorageFactory
public interface MatrixStorageFactory
Service Provider Interface (SPI) for creating matrix storage.

This interface works in conjunction with MatrixFactory to support pluggable storage implementations (e.g., Native off-heap storage).

Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <E> MatrixStorage<E>
    createDense(int rows, int cols, Ring<E> ring)
    Creates a new dense matrix storage.
    default int
    getPriority()
    Returns the priority of this factory.

  • Method Details

    • createDense

      <E> MatrixStorage<E> createDense(int rows, int cols, Ring<E> ring)
      Creates a new dense matrix storage.
      Type Parameters:
      E - the element type
      Parameters:
      rows - number of rows
      cols - number of columns
      ring - the ring defining the element type and zero
      Returns:
      a new MatrixStorage instance

    • getPriority

      default int getPriority()
      Returns the priority of this factory. Higher values are preferred.
      Returns:
      priority
